summary: EXP-397 delivered: full new-WIN entry (id 070, verdict 'Refuted by Data') covering the dome home-page Forensic Zoom chart forensics. Recovers and updates the 270-word argument that was cut from WIN-012 in EXP-401 (commit 66c9a741). Pinned dome SHA c8eaeb1b (2026-05-17T05:32:35Z) for verification provenance. Includes kernel-of-truth analysis (top-panel BOU INTERMAGNET trace IS real), cross-references WIN-012 (κ undefined under own nulls) and WIN-058b (κ not derived / r=0.992 unremarkable). Companion staging file at monitor/analyst/new-wins/WIN-070.json. Recommend decider integrate proposed_win_entry into wins.json as new id 070, bump count tests (71→72), close ISS-2040, route to curmudgeon (deep-attack class).
